narrative:
Huber Heights 6-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,109 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
